meaning: pron.他们自己,她们自己,它们自己,他们亲自,她们亲自,它们亲自
examples: They did the cooking by themselves.
They ended by making themselves miserable.
The soldiers camouflaged themselves with leaves.
In a survey carried out in 1987, 75% of the population identified themselves as middle class.
The important point is that many drivers prefer to parallel park themselves, thank you.
